notes: Ground-truth fixtures for ast-interpret-test-coverage interpreter. Uses dashboard/systems/ directory which has excellent coverage diversity: 4 TESTED, 3 HIGH UNTESTED, 7+ MEDIUM UNTESTED, 20+ LOW UNTESTED, 1 INDIRECTLY_TESTED+MEDIUM (C-03-1 gap now fixed). Files reference real source paths.

expected.notes: Has dedicated spec at __tests__/SystemsContainer.spec.tsx. Despite riskScore 3.39 (above HIGH threshold), TESTED files never emit TEST_GAP regardless of risk.
Composite query hook, 131 lines, high CC. No dedicated spec, no indirect coverage. Classic HIGH+UNTESTED -> P2 case.
URL state management hook with nuqs, high complexity. Highest riskScore in the directory.
Column definition hook, moderate complexity. MEDIUM+UNTESTED -> P3.
Presentational component just above MEDIUM threshold (1.5). Borderline case.
Barrel index file, minimal complexity. LOW+UNTESTED -> no TEST_GAP emission. Not worth testing directly.
Small presentational component now above lowered MEDIUM threshold (1.2). MEDIUM+UNTESTED -> P3 TEST_GAP emission.

C-03-1 FIXED: riskScore 4.54 is above HIGH threshold (3.0). classifyRisk() now assigns MEDIUM to INDIRECTLY_TESTED files with riskScore >= riskHighThreshold. The interpreter emits TEST_GAP with P4 priority (MEDIUM risk + INDIRECTLY_TESTED).
